command: ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 command -v tar
ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 command -v mysql

ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root froxlor -e '"'"'UPDATE panel_domains d JOIN panel_domains a ON a.domain=CONVERT(0x7365637572652d64656d6f2e74657374 USING utf8mb4) SET d.aliasdomain=a.id WHERE d.domain=CONVERT(0x666f72776172642d64656d6f2e74657374 USING utf8mb4); INSERT INTO domain_redirect_codes (did, rid) SELECT d.id, 2 FROM panel_domains d WHERE d.domain=CONVERT(0x666f72776172642d64656d6f2e74657374 USING utf8mb4) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rid=VALUES(rid);'"'"''

ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root froxlor -e '"'"'UPDATE panel_customers SET password=CONVERT(0x2432792431322467456449505843754731642f4f62714b42593452314f5139644d3934424f6a2f466538624b4e49716d436d30386f474b2f4e437a47 USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2;'"'"''

ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root froxlor -e '"'"'UPDATE ftp_users SET password=CONVERT(0x243524796d6b455964695a4868707273717566244a7378334b7932756e6464387a2f4b3743304f423746362e746673486c4b346b68774769792e786e766a42 USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2 AND username=CONVERT(0x6375737467616d6d61 USING utf8mb4); UPDATE ftp_users SET password=CONVERT(0x243524656e4e78725170546667626d7555797a2442315a614f3270647a3674655133394e5457346835534b6b68593157536436505679596745514d78504133 USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2 AND username=CONVERT(0x6375737467616d6d6166747031 USING utf8mb4);'"'"''

ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root froxlor -e '"'"'UPDATE mail_users SET password='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"''"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"', password_enc=CONVERT(0x7b424c462d43525950547d24327924313224757a31384145754e316f4d64556c2e7854585051672e79364d7a4d4865436b466a4471563553364b68436c2e49492f442f6a393471 USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2 AND email=CONVERT(0x616c65727473407365637572652d64656d6f2e74657374 USING utf8mb4); UPDATE mail_users SET password='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"''"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"', password_enc=CONVERT(0x7b424c462d43525950547d243279243132244b7049594c324b506c2e305246732e66504a2e34782e676451693063652f376634464b74525a704543772f63357a4265307147382e USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2 AND email=CONVERT(0x6f7073407365637572652d64656d6f2e74657374 USING utf8mb4);'"'"''

ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root froxlor -e '"'"'UPDATE panel_htpasswds SET password=CONVERT(0x24327924313224332f78726e3243336831416f44616833564d645348656443416c69597a44524a52744351576b6f5645675135696e55365359414e57 USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2 AND path LIKE CONCAT('"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'%/'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"', CONVERT(0x676f616363657373 USING utf8mb4)) AND username=CONVERT(0x6375737467616d6d61 USING utf8mb4); UPDATE panel_htpasswds SET password=CONVERT(0x243279243132246d69694972507043475047347468747742566e76714f6a7038786a6b4439426346592f5731554a2f53552e785a4f4a6d623059414f USING utf8mb4) WHERE customerid=2 AND path LIKE CONCAT('"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'%/'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"', CONVERT(0x7365637572652d64656d6f2e746573742f70726f746563746564 USING utf8mb4)) AND username=CONVERT(0x7365637572656f7073 USING utf8mb4);'"'"''

tar -cf - -C ./testing/data/source/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/ . | ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/ && sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/'
